step.title: Health checks
step.action: Run health check endpoints and verify all services are responding correctly.

step.title: Monitoring verification
step.action: Verify monitoring dashboards show normal metrics: error rates, latency, throughput.

step.title: Alert configuration
step.action: Verify alerting rules are active and correctly configured for the new release.

step.title: Smoke tests
step.action: Execute the smoke test plan from the deploy checklist and verify all critical paths work.

step.title: Produce post-deploy report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with post-deployment results.
